channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New tool measures whether lactating mothers' psychological needs are being met
item.description: A UH nursing researcher has developed the Lactation Psychological Needs Scale, providing a new way to measure the psychological experience of breastfe...

item.title: Women physicians’ health is paying the price of medicine
item.description: I knew from the beginning that something was wrong in the culture of medicine, but I never believed it would almost kill me. This is not a story about...

item.title: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship arrives at Tenerife in Spain's Canary Islands
item.description: A hantavirus-stricken cruise ship with more than 140 people on board has arrived at Tenerife, the largest of Spain's Canary Islands, off the coast of ...

item.title: Giuliana Rancic Gets Candid On Her Career, Breast Cancer, and Staying Active
item.description: In our most recent WebMD Real Stories Breast Cancer Condition Guide, Rancic, 51, reflects on her dreamy red carpet career, bout with breast cancer, an...
